Registry / Terms / sequential control device

sequential control device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #03491 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 139:2007
#02030
T.4.9
device which allows switching from one bank to another. This device may be included in a measuring system or may be part of the refueling station
pending

#03491
3.4.6
device which allows switching from a bank to another one. This device may be included in a measuring system or may be part of the refueling station
